commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof or explicitly override the proof gap before merge.; Cleared: The diff only normalizes Discord registry payloads and adds tests; it does not change dependencies, workflows, permissions, secrets handling, network calls, or command execution. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds recursive undefined pruning for Discord persistent component/modal registry writes and a regression test covering builder-produced button/modal entries.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows builder-produced entries can own `undefined` optional fields and current main sends those entries directly to a state store that rejects non-JSON values; I did not run the live gateway path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof or explicitly override the proof gap before merge.
